name: Grooved Wood with Glass 4-Door Arch Cabinet - Natural - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add stylish storage to your home with this Grooved Wood with Glass 4-Door Arch Cabinet from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Whether you need to store your books or display decor pieces in your living room, this accent cabinet can be part of any room in your home. The storage cabinet has a two-tiered design with five shelves, two windowpane glass doors on each level, an arched top and a grooved pattern. It's designed in a natural wood finish that blends easily into a variety of interior aesthetics.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
